flow_points: India started strong, scoring 86/1 in the Powerplay at a high run rate of 14.33.
Namibia's Powerplay was slower, reaching 57/1 at a run rate of 9.5.
Ishan Kishan anchored India's innings, contributing 29.2% of the team's runs.
MG Erasmus delivered a crucial spell for Namibia, taking 4 wickets for 20 runs.
Arshdeep Singh had an expensive outing for India with an economy of 12.0.
HH Pandya delivered a crucial spell, taking 2 wickets for 21 runs at an economy of 5.25.
S Dube bowled a match-defining spell with an outstanding economy of 4.71.
JJ Bumrah maintained pressure with a crucial spell of 1 wicket for 21 runs.
CV Varun delivered a match-defining spell, taking 3 wickets for 7 runs at an economy of 3.5.
Namibia struggled under extreme chase pressure, leading to a late-innings collapse.
India secured a dominant victory by 93 runs.
